title: Algerian Lentil Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful Algerian-inspired lentil stew made with lentils, vegetables, and aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion, carrot, and celery; cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add algerian seasoning, mustard, and tomato paste; cook for 1 minute.
Add lentils, water, and diced tomatoes; bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes or until the lentils are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with crusty bread.
